needle_load_incl_idle.note: Claude splits 6s idle + 8s needle_load; GPT-4o collapses to 7.0s

drain_alignment.note: 9th drain-agreement case; drain-divergence pattern continues eroding.

placement_alignment.note: Claude's 2mm default vs GPT-4o's 1.5mm tighter read. Narrower mm gap than V24.

fls_score_reconciliation.notes: Tight reconciliation matching V24 tier (ΔFLS 1.5 vs V24's 1.6). Both teachers independently identified over-tying after the required third throw as the dominant time sink. Unanimous diagnosis of the failure mode.

systematic_findings.endpoint_agreement: Δtime 1.5s — second-tightest endpoint agreement in the series (behind only V24's 1.9s, and V24 was slightly looser). V21 endpoint is unambiguous to both teachers.
systematic_findings.phase_boundary_disagreement: Claude bundles extra reinforcing work into suture_cut (65s), GPT-4o bundles it into third_throw (70s). Same phenomenon as V24/V17/V19/V22. Tails converge within 3.2s — strongest convergence observed in any boundary-disagreement case.
systematic_findings.penalty_scope_disagreement: 7th case of Claude > GPT-4o penalties (Δ 3.0). Narrower than V24 (was 3.5). Claude applies 2mm default; GPT-4o reads 1.5mm. Pattern consistent.
systematic_findings.diagnosis_agreement: Both teachers independently named over-tying after the required three-throw sequence as the #1 failure mode. This is the most aligned qualitative diagnosis in the series.
systematic_findings.drain_agreement_streak: 9 agree / 6 diverge — pattern is drifting clearly toward agreement.
systematic_findings.confidence_split: GPT-4o 0.71 vs Claude 0.38 (Δ 0.33) — second-largest after V24's 0.32. Claude continues to penalize itself harder for monitor-recording conditions.
